name: Options screen - gamepad push/pop roundtrip
description: Full pad journey: from the main menu, Down lands on Button_Options (flip + nav), A pushes WBP_OptionsScreen whose DesiredFocusWidget (Master_Volume_Slider row) relays focus to its inner AnalogSlider; Down/Down reaches Button_Back, A pops back to the main menu and CommonUI auto-restores focus to Button_Options. Requires CommonUI.ShouldVirtualAcceptSimulateMouseButton=0 (DefaultEngine.ini) - with the engine default, gamepad A becomes a simulated mouse click at the cursor and never reaches the focused button. KNOWN noise: options activation logs 'Cannot create action binding ... no action provided' (bIsBackHandler=true but no CommonInput InputData/DefaultBackAction configured yet) - the nav step tolerates the error response; fix that config to also get gamepad B = back.

steps.note: desired-target row on the focus path
row relays focus to its inner AnalogSlider
bAutoRestoreFocus returns focus to the pre-push widget
